---
title: "DAF — Delphi Application Foundation"
subtitle: "Community Edition"
page-layout: full
toc: false
sidebar: false
---

![](assets/DAF-Logo.png){width=180 fig-align="center"}

<div class="text-center mt-4 mb-5">
<h1 class="display-5">Bringing modern practices to Delphi</h1>
<p class="lead">Dependency Injection · Structured Logging · Configuration · CQRS · BDD Testing</p>

:::{.d-flex .justify-content-center .gap-3 .mt-4}
[Get Started](docs/getting-started.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg}
[View on GitHub](https://github.com/Delphi-DAF/dafce){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-lg}
:::
</div>

---

## What is DAF?

DAF is a modular and extensible library for building structured, maintainable, and testable Delphi applications.
It modernizes Delphi development by promoting patterns inspired by the .NET ecosystem — making it a natural bridge for developers coming from C#.

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### 🔌 Dependency Injection
A full DI container modeled after `Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection`.
Supports singleton, transient and scoped lifetimes.

[→ Learn more](modules/di.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### 🏠 Hosting
`IHost` and `IHostBuilder` for application composition and lifecycle — just like ASP.NET Core.

[→ Learn more](modules/hosting.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### ⚙️ Configuration
Bind configuration from JSON, environment variables, and in-memory sources to typed Delphi classes.

[→ Learn more](modules/configuration.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### 📋 Logging
Structured logging with scopes and message templates, modeled after `Microsoft.Extensions.Logging`.

[→ Learn more](modules/logging.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### ✉️ MediatR
CQRS and in-process messaging: commands, queries, notifications and pipelines.

[→ Learn more](modules/mediator.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### 🧪 MiniSpec
BDD testing framework inspired by Cucumber and RSpec, with Gherkin-style specs in Delphi.

[→ Learn more](modules/minispec.qmd)
:::

:::

---

## Browse all modules

```{=html}
<div class="text-center">
  <a href="modules/index.qmd" class="btn btn-outline-primary">View all modules →</a>
</div>
```
